allow: Bash(chmod +x /Volumes/DATA/UIT/PROJECTS/learning_data_system/setup.sh && echo "chmod done")

Bash(docker compose -f /Volumes/DATA/UIT/PROJECTS/learning_data_system/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "SELECT course_id, course_name FROM courses ORDER BY course_id;" 2>&1 | head -40)

Bash(docker compose -f /Volumes/DATA/UIT/PROJECTS/learning_data_system/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT 
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM course_materials\) AS course_materials,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM student_activity_log\) AS activity_log,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM system_config\) AS system_config,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM course_prerequisites\) AS prerequisites,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM student_sensitive\) AS student_sensitive,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM branches\) AS branches,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM media_assets\) AS media_assets
;" 2>&1)

Bash(\\
for demo in demo_oop_relational demo_deductive demo_distributed demo_nosql_jsonb demo_spatial_postgis demo_fulltext_multimedia; do
  echo "=== $demo ==="
  docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system \\
    -v ON_ERROR_STOP=0 \\
    -f "/demo_sql/${demo}.sql" 2>&1 | grep -E "^ERROR|^FATAL|INSERT [0-9]|rows|CREATE|ALTER|UPDATE [0-9]|^psql" | head -20
  echo ""
done)

Bash(\\
for demo in demo_oop_relational demo_spatial_postgis; do
  echo "=== $demo ==="
  docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system \\
    -v ON_ERROR_STOP=0 \\
    -f "/demo_sql/${demo}.sql" 2>&1 | grep -E "^ERROR|^FATAL|INSERT [0-9]|UPDATE [0-9]|CREATE TABLE|CREATE TYPE|CREATE DOMAIN|INHERITS" | head -20
  echo ""
done)

Bash(docker compose -f /Volumes/DATA/UIT/PROJECTS/learning_data_system/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT 'course_prerequisites'  AS table_name, COUNT\(*\) AS rows FROM course_prerequisites
UNION ALL SELECT 'course_materials',  COUNT\(*\) FROM course_materials
UNION ALL SELECT 'student_activity_log', COUNT\(*\) FROM student_activity_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'system_config',     COUNT\(*\) FROM system_config
UNION ALL SELECT 'attendance_distributed', COUNT\(*\) FROM attendance_distributed
UNION ALL SELECT 'student_sensitive', COUNT\(*\) FROM student_sensitive
UNION ALL SELECT 'branches',          COUNT\(*\) FROM branches
UNION ALL SELECT 'student_locations', COUNT\(*\) FROM student_locations
UNION ALL SELECT 'student_oo',        COUNT\(*\) FROM student_oo
UNION ALL SELECT 'instructor_oo',     COUNT\(*\) FROM instructor_oo
UNION ALL SELECT 'media_assets',      COUNT\(*\) FROM media_assets
ORDER BY table_name;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT s.student_id,
       s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS full_name,
       a.course_name,
       a.final_grade,
       a.semester
FROM students s
JOIN archived_enrollments_2022 a ON s.student_id = a.student_id
WHERE a.status = 'Completed'
ORDER BY a.final_grade DESC
LIMIT 8;")
Bash(git log --format="%H" | while read hash; do git show -s --format="%B" $hash; done | grep -i "claude\\|anthropic\\|co-author")
Bash(cd /Volumes/DATA/UIT/PROJECTS/learning_data_system/report && python generate_report.py 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U t3h_user -d t3h_postgres -c "\\dt public.*" 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -l 2>&1)
Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "\\dt public.*" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT 
    schemaname,
    tablename,
    \(xpath\('/row/c/text\(\)', query_to_xml\(format\('SELECT count\(*\) AS c FROM %I.%I', schemaname, tablename\), FALSE, TRUE, ''\)\)\)[1]::text::int AS row_count
FROM pg_tables
WHERE schemaname = 'public'
  AND tablename NOT IN \('spatial_ref_sys'\)
ORDER BY tablename;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
-- Check extensions
SELECT extname, extversion FROM pg_extension ORDER BY extname;
" 2>&1 && docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
-- Check types and domains
SELECT typname, typtype FROM pg_type WHERE typnamespace = 'public'::regnamespace AND typtype IN \('d','c','e'\) ORDER BY typtype, typname;
" 2>&1 && docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
-- Check views + matviews
SELECT schemaname, viewname, 'view' AS kind FROM pg_views WHERE schemaname='public'
UNION ALL
SELECT schemaname, matviewname, 'matview' FROM pg_matviews WHERE schemaname='public'
ORDER BY kind, viewname;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT c.relname AS tablename, a.attname FROM pg_attribute a
JOIN pg_class c ON a.attrelid = c.oid
JOIN pg_namespace n ON c.relnamespace = n.oid
WHERE n.nspname='public' AND a.atttypid = 'tsvector'::regtype AND NOT a.attisdropped;
" 2>&1

docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT tgname, c.relname FROM pg_trigger t JOIN pg_class c ON t.tgrelid=c.oid WHERE NOT t.tgisinternal ORDER BY c.relname;
" 2>&1

docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
SELECT 
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM student_locations\) AS student_locations,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM branches WHERE geom IS NOT NULL\) AS branches_with_geom,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM course_materials\) AS course_materials,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM course_prerequisites\) AS prerequisites,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM student_sensitive\) AS student_sensitive,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM media_assets\) AS media_assets;
" 2>&1)

Bash(docker exec t3h_postgres psql -U postgres -d learning_data_system -c "
-- 1. DEDUCTIVE: course_prerequisites facts
INSERT INTO course_prerequisites \(course_id, prereq_id, is_mandatory\) VALUES
  \(9,  8,  TRUE\),
  \(10, 9,  TRUE\),
  \(11, 10, TRUE\),
  \(6,  5,  TRUE\),
  \(7,  5,  FALSE\),
  \(4,  3,  TRUE\),
  \(16, 15, TRUE\),
  \(15, 8,  FALSE\)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS prerequisites_inserted FROM course_prerequisites;
" 2>&1)
